training_source: official ecCKD tabulated gas-optics reduced hard-gate objective
parameterization: softmax weights plus per-g-point absorption and Rayleigh log-scales

rows.reduction_method: evenly selected official ecCKD g-points with renormalized weights
greedy searched 16 shortwave g-point subset with official weights renormalized
greedy searched 16 shortwave g-point subset with least-squares fitted shortwave weights
greedy searched 16 shortwave g-point subset with projected boundary-weighted fitted shortwave weights
weighted greedy 16 shortwave g-point subset with projected simplex weights
weighted greedy 16 shortwave g-point subset with projected hard-gate max-norm weights
weighted greedy 16 shortwave g-point subset with diagnostic fitted coefficient scales
evenly selected official ecCKD g-points with least-squares fitted shortwave weights
adjacent official ecCKD g-point bins with spectral-weighted coefficient averages
non-adjacent coefficient-similarity shortwave g-point pairs with spectral-weighted coefficient averages
weighted-greedy anchor g-points plus nearest-neighbor coefficient-similarity bins

topology_candidate_scan.best_method: weighted greedy 16 shortwave g-point subset with projected hard-gate max-norm weights

next_required_work: Replace the current per-g-point scaling search with a richer reduced k-distribution coefficient/topology optimization; the current 48-parameter search remains far above the hard-gate target.
notes: This is the official/reduced ecCKD training-path artifact: it demonstrates objective construction, trainable parameters, Reactant/Enzyme checks, and deterministic objective reduction on official ecCKD references. It does not close the reduced-accuracy gate until final_objective_target_ratio <= 1.
